name: claude-plugins
description: Official Socials Claude Code plugin: MCP server for the Socials browser extension (Claude Desktop compatible)

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=plugins/socials/dist/index.cjs && esbuild src/native-messaging-host.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/native-messaging-host.cjs && esbuild src/install-native-host.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/install-native-host.cjs
